claim_bullets.bullet_text: The memoize function creates a generator that caches results using memos and iterators (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.286-287).
The implementation is served by the Pot: Collections 264 (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.286-287).

source_record_text: JavaScript Allongé – A modular guide to JavaScript fundamentals and advanced techniques, focusing on memoizing iterables.
